## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] New screens / interactive elements have stable `testID`s in `src/testIds.ts`

- [ ] New debug-menu actions documented in `docs/DEBUG_MENU.md`
- [ ] New seed scenarios documented in `docs/SCENARIOS.md`
